rationale: Review 2 correctly diagnoses the IsUnipotent type mismatch — it uses GroupLike k A while the diff already defines AlgPoints k A for G(k) on line 39, leaving AlgPoints unused — a real correctness issue verifiable against the diff. Review 1 mischaracterizes this as a mathematical adequacy problem and suggests a misdirecting fix, while Review 2's actionable guidance (use AlgPoints or correct the docstring) would genuinely improve the PR.
